name: Filter Products or Categories from Comparison Shopping Feeds
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The search functionality allows you to filter by custom fields, product category, price, status and much more."}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "To get started, in the "}, {"text": "Sales Channels", "bold": true}, {"text": " section navigate to "}, {"text": "Other ", "bold": true}, {"text": "> "}, {"text": "Shopping Feeds", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "On the already installed feed, click the "}, {"text": "Edit", "bold": true}, {"text": " button to open the template. This is where we will be making suitable changes."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/FilterProductsorCategoriesfromComparisonShoppingFeeds1.05T5g00000w6UweEAE.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/FilterProductsorCategoriesfromComparisonShoppingFeeds1.05T5g00000w6UweEAE.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image1", "width": 700, "height": 248}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Scroll down to the "}, {"text": "File Builder", "bold": true}, {"text": " and click on the "}, {"text": "Filter", "bold": true}, {"text": " tab. Here you can filter products you want to display on your feed. Set the filters according to your specific needs and scroll down the bottom and press "}, {"text": "Save Changes", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/FilterProductsorCategoriesfromComparisonShoppingFeeds2.05T5g00000w6UwoEAE.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/FilterProductsorCategoriesfromComparisonShoppingFeeds2.05T5g00000w6UwoEAE.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image2", "width": 700, "height": 248}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Scroll back to the top and on the top right hand side click the "}, {"text": "Generate Data File", "bold": true}, {"text": " button to refresh the data feed."}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/FilterProductsorCategoriesfromComparisonShoppingFeeds3.05T5g00000w6UO9EAM.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/FilterProductsorCategoriesfromComparisonShoppingFeeds3.05T5g00000w6UO9EAM.png", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "image3", "width": 700, "height": 247}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Once this is complete, click the "}, {"text": "Download Data File", "bold": true}, {"text": " button to review the filters to ensure the filters have been applied correctly."}]}]}]}]
